summary: Added a top-level 'trending' command (live-first, offline-ranked fallback).
reason: Trending is the homepage headline surface and a SKILL trigger phrase; promoted from the nested 'tweets trending' endpoint to a discoverable top-level command. Not in novel_features, so a reprint must preserve it.
validated_outcome: trending --json returns ranked tweets live and offline; dogfood help/happy/json/error all pass.
